title: ArcStatusConformanceCaseFile
description: A conformance corpus file is a JSON array of cases. Each case is either a single-event case (carrying `event` + schema_valid/validator_valid) or a sequence case (carrying `events` + sequence_valid). A runner asserts its implementation agrees with each declared verdict.

tier.description: Which spec §6 conformance tier the case exercises.

event.description: The single candidate value (any JSON, including intentionally malformed).

schema_valid.description: Expected verdict of a stateless JSON Schema validator against spec/schema.json.

validator_valid.description: Expected verdict of a full reference validator (validate()).

events.description: The event stream for one arc.

sequence_valid.description: Expected verdict of the reference validateSequence().

issue_index.description: Advisory: 0-indexed position where the first violation should be reported. A runner MAY assert this in strict mode.
